tasks.subject: Task 0: Extract types and formatters
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Move pure data shapes and formatting helpers out of UserStatsModal.tsx with zero behavior change.

**Files:**
- Create: src/app/components/userStats/types.ts
- Create: src/app/components/userStats/formatters.ts
- Modify: src/app/components/UserStatsModal.tsx

**Verify:** `npx tsc --noEmit && npm run lint`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/app/components/userStats/types.ts", "src/app/components/userStats/formatters.ts", "src/app/components/UserStatsModal.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "npx tsc --noEmit && npm run lint", "acceptanceCriteria": ["types.ts exports the three interfaces", "formatters.ts exports the four helpers", "UserStatsModal.tsx imports them and removes inline declarations", "Modal renders identically with no visual change"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Extract achievements logic
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Move the ACHIEVEMENTS array and progress-calculation logic out of the modal into a pure module.

**Files:**
- Create: src/app/components/userStats/achievements.ts
- Modify: src/app/components/UserStatsModal.tsx

**Verify:** `npx tsc --noEmit && npm run build`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/app/components/userStats/achievements.ts", "src/app/components/UserStatsModal.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "npx tsc --noEmit && npm run build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["achievements.ts exports ACHIEVEMENTS and three pure functions taking stats explicitly", "UserStatsModal.tsx removes inline definitions and updates call sites", "Úspěchy tab renders identically before and after"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Create scoped lounge CSS shell
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add user-stats-modal.css with lounge tokens, scrim, panel, drag handle, body scroll, footer, and reduced-motion fallback.

**Files:**
- Create: src/app/components/user-stats-modal.css
- Modify: src/app/components/UserStatsModal.tsx (add import only)

**Verify:** `npm run build`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/app/components/user-stats-modal.css", "src/app/components/UserStatsModal.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "npm run build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["CSS file with lounge tokens scoped under .user-stats-lounge", "Modal imports the CSS but JSX is unchanged", "Build passes; no visual change"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Replace modal frame with lounge chrome
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Swap outer scrim, panel container, drag handle, header (avatar + meta + Live pill + close), tab strip with gradient underline, and footer to lounge styling. Tab content panels stay on old Tailwind for now.

**Files:**
- Modify: src/app/components/UserStatsModal.tsx
- Modify: src/app/components/user-stats-modal.css

**Verify:** `npm run build`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/app/components/UserStatsModal.tsx", "src/app/components/user-stats-modal.css"], "verifyCommand": "npm run build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["New chrome (panel + header + tabs + footer) renders with lounge styling", "Live pill shows correct state (loading/live/error)", "Tab strip works with gradient underline on active tab", "Mobile bottom sheet + drag handle preserved", "All 5 tabs still render their old content correctly"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Build OverviewTab (numbers-led hero)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace overview tab content with direction A: gradient hero number, 4 mini-tiles (Hry/Voice/Spotify/Stream) with vs-průměr or Top X% pills, Další statistiky strip, 8-row timeline list.

**Files:**
- Create: src/app/components/userStats/OverviewTab.tsx
- Modify: src/app/components/user-stats-modal.css
- Modify: src/app/components/UserStatsModal.tsx

**Verify:** `npx tsc --noEmit && npm run build`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/app/components/userStats/OverviewTab.tsx", "src/app/components/user-stats-modal.css", "src/app/components/UserStatsModal.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "npx tsc --noEmit && npm run build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Gradient headline with totalOnlineTime renders", "4 tiles with correct accent colors and comparison pills", "Micro-strip with 4 stats", "Timeline list of up to 8 sessions", "Server averages caption only when present", "Layout adapts at 375px"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Build SpotifyTab, GamingTab, VoiceTab
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace three list-based tabs with a shared lounge skeleton (tab hero with 2 inline stats + ranked list panel(s) + faint footnote + empty state).

**Files:**
- Create: src/app/components/userStats/SpotifyTab.tsx
- Create: src/app/components/userStats/GamingTab.tsx
- Create: src/app/components/userStats/VoiceTab.tsx
- Modify: src/app/components/user-stats-modal.css
- Modify: src/app/components/UserStatsModal.tsx

**Verify:** `npm run build`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/app/components/userStats/SpotifyTab.tsx", "src/app/components/userStats/GamingTab.tsx", "src/app/components/userStats/VoiceTab.tsx", "src/app/components/user-stats-modal.css", "src/app/components/UserStatsModal.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "npm run build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["All three tabs render tab hero + ranked list + footnote", "Accent colors correct per tab", "First-place rank pill is tinted accent", "Empty states render when arrays empty"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Build AchievementsTab (trophy badge grid)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace achievements tab with single 2-col badge grid. Unlocked badges glow with cyan halo + Dokončeno pill; locked show grayscale icon + progress bar with current/threshold caption.

**Files:**
- Create: src/app/components/userStats/AchievementsTab.tsx
- Modify: src/app/components/user-stats-modal.css
- Modify: src/app/components/UserStatsModal.tsx

**Verify:** `npm run build`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/app/components/userStats/AchievementsTab.tsx", "src/app/components/user-stats-modal.css", "src/app/components/UserStatsModal.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "npm run build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["8 badges in 2-col grid (1-col under 540px)", "Sort: unlocked first by category, then locked by progress", "Unlocked have cyan halo + Dokončeno pill", "Locked have grayscale icon + progress bar", "Special category shows text status", "Section counter shows unlocked/total"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Loading skeleton + lounge error state
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace centered spinner with shimmer skeleton on initial load. Restyle error card with lounge tokens; preserve retry button behavior.

**Files:**
- Modify: src/app/components/user-stats-modal.css
- Modify: src/app/components/UserStatsModal.tsx

**Verify:** `npm run build`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/app/components/user-stats-modal.css", "src/app/components/UserStatsModal.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "npm run build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Skeleton placeholders replace the spinner on initial load", "Shimmer animation disabled under prefers-reduced-motion", "Error card uses lounge styling with retry button", "30s refresh remains silent"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: Accessibility, motion, and focus management
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add ARIA roles for dialog and tablist, focus trap, escape-to-close, arrow-key tab nav, entry/exit animations, and prefers-reduced-motion fallback.

**Files:**
- Modify: src/app/components/UserStatsModal.tsx
- Modify: src/app/components/user-stats-modal.css

**Verify:** `npm run build`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/app/components/UserStatsModal.tsx", "src/app/components/user-stats-modal.css"], "verifyCommand": "npm run build", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Dialog has correct ARIA roles", "Escape closes and focus returns to trigger", "Focus trap cycles within modal", "Arrow keys navigate tabs", "Animations work and respect prefers-reduced-motion"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: Final cleanup + visual QA
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Remove residual Tailwind classes from the modal, confirm visuals across breakpoints, and verify the MostActiveMembers integration still triggers the modal.

**Files:**
- Modify: src/app/components/UserStatsModal.tsx

**Verify:** `npm run build && npm run lint`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/app/components/UserStatsModal.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "npm run build && npm run lint", "acceptanceCriteria": ["No dead Tailwind classes in modal", "Build and lint pass clean", "Modal works at desktop / 768px / 375px", "MostActiveMembers integration still triggers modal"]}
```
